Category.title: Category
Category.description: Represents a category or sub-category for organizing content.

parentId.description: The ID of the parent category. Null for top-level categories.

ContentItem.title: Content Item
ContentItem.description: Represents a piece of content within a category.

title.description: The title or text of the content.

imageUrl.description: URL of the image for the content.

fileUrl.description: URL to the file associated with the content.

categoryId.description: The ID of the category this content belongs to.

User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user in the system.

SubscriptionDialog.title: Subscription Dialog
SubscriptionDialog.description: Configuration for the subscription popup dialog.

enabled.description: Whether the dialog is enabled or not.

title.description: The main title of the dialog.

description.description: The descriptive text in the dialog.

subscribeUrl.description: The URL the subscribe button links to.

/categories/{categoryId}.description: Stores all categories, with parent-child relationships defined by parentId.

/app-config/subscription-dialog.description: Single document to store the configuration for the subscription dialog.
